//: Pro-tier typecheck of the consuming app (mobile rendering plan, section 9.3). Running `tsc -p tsconfig.pro.json` proves the app type-checks against the Pro adapter set AND that the Pro contract shape still matches the OSS contract (a missing/extra capability or a prop drift fails here).
